name: overlord
description: Expose Ben's local Overlord capabilities as lazy-loadable MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Email, status, dispatch, and local Overlord capability lookup
interface.longDescription: Expose the shared Overlord toolkit as searchable MCP tools so Codex and other MCP-capable agents can discover and use local capabilities instead of relying on prose memory.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Overlord tools for local email, bridge status, worker dispatch, and capability lookup.
